name: cogni-tips
description: Strategic trend scouting and reporting pipeline specialized for the German Mittelstand and DACH markets. Combines the Smarter Service Trendradar (4-dimension structure) with the TIPS content framework (Trends, Implications, Possibilities, Solutions). Bilingual research (EN/DE) with curated DACH institutional sources (VDMA, BITKOM, Fraunhofer, Zukunftsinstitut, EUR-Lex).
